title: URAファイナルズ決勝の後に

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! Just have a listen to those cheers! They
applaud your victory!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Not only do you have the admiration of the
crowd, but of future racers among them who will
strive to surpass your achievements.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You have left a mark of hope for all Umamusume
to see. I thank you for that display of excellence.
And finally...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You stand at the peak—the most excellent trainer
and the most excellent Umamusume!
